title: Nations Odyssey
description: A Modpack inspired by modern age RPGs. Skills and Attributes, Better Combat and End, Incendium and Magic!
body:
This modpack attempts to create an RPG-like version of Minecraft, consisting of various new bosses from Bosses of Mass Destruction and AdventureZ, mobs from various different mods, blocks and more.

This also has a Class system implemented through the RPG and More RPG series by ZsoltMolnarrr and Fichte, respectively, as well as a custom-made Skill Tree (derived from the original one by the library mod creator) that uses the Puffish Skills and Puffish Attributes mods which further immerses the user in the Minecraft RPG experience.

Several other mods are included for quality of life and further immersiveness.
